title: Kidplokio 7pc Blue Semi Truck Toy Car Carrier Diecast Playset for Boys 3 and Up
description:
Calling all little ones with a need for speed! This awesome Kidplokio 7pc Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter Playset comes with 6 diecast toy cars that can be easily tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy, making this a super fun 2-in-1 toy set. The larger semi-truck toy features two plastic snap-closure sidings to ensure all the toy cars stay together after playtime and don’t get lost! The semi-hauler toy truck with toy cars is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling, or out at play dates

Kidplokio 7pc Blue Semi Truck Toy Car Carrier Diecast Playset for Boys 3 and Up

Calling all little ones with a need for speed!

This awesome Kidplokio 7pc Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter Playset comes with 6 diecast toy cars that can be easily tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy, making this a super fun 2-in-1 toy set. The larger semi-truck toy features two plastic snap-closure sidings to ensure all the toy cars stay together after playtime and don’t get lost!

Key Features

  • BLUE SEMI TRUCK TOY: This awesome toy truck comes with 6 diecast cars that can be tucked away into the sides of the semi-truck transporter toy; The semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the pieces stay together after playtime
  • ENCOURAGES CREATIVITY AND IMAGINATION: With so many playing options available, kids will have hours of pretend play fun racing cars and driving the large semi-truck toy on its own; this playset is also great for cognitive development as kids think up lots of pretend play scenarios, while also working their fine motor skills
  • TRAVEL FRIENDLY TOY CARRIER: The truck toy is constructed of durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of wear and tear in the playroom! The sturdy plastic side snap closures and retractable carrier handle make this a great toy to travel with keeping all the components safe and secure
  • SAFE FOR KIDS - Made of durable plastic and diecast, the semi-truck toy carrier is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Can be wiped down and left to air dry in between uses as needed
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14 x 7 x 5 inches; Color: Blue; Weight: 1.06lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Recommended ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPLTT013432023
  • UPC: 810131027957
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 7pc

The semi-hauler toy truck with toy cars is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling, or out at play dates. In addition, playing with a manual truck toy can also help your little one use their imagination, encourage exploration and creativity, sharpen their fine motor skills, and teach them to share with siblings, friends, and schoolmates too!

With the toy truck's clever design and easy travel portability, hours of fun playtime for little ones and their friends or siblings await! No batteries or assembly is required here, so your child can have fun right out of the box.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+
